ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: The time-zone in which the authoring date should be shown. Either your local time-zone (default), the author's time-zone during commit creation or UTC\xB100:00.
ast.target: The time-zone in which the authoring date should be shown. Either your local time-zone (default), the author's time-zone during commit creation or UTC\xB100:00.

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Whitespace and newlines are interpreted as part of the document and in changes by default (hence not ignored). This makes the last line being shown as 'changed' when a new subsequent line is added, even if the previously last line's text is the same.
If you don't care about purely-whitespace changes (e.g. list nesting / quote indentation changes), then activating this will provide more meaningful change detection.
ast.target:
Whitespace and newlines are interpreted as part of the document and in changes by default (hence not ignored). This makes the last line being shown as 'changed' when a new subsequent line is added, even if the previously last line's text is the same.
If you don't care about purely-whitespace changes (e.g. list nesting / quote indentation changes), then activating this will provide more meaningful change detection.

regex.source: setDesc(`If turned on, sets last auto ${i} timestamp to the latest commit timestamp. This reduces the frequency of auto ${i} when doing manual commits.`)
regex.target: setDesc(`如果开启，雷姆会将最后一次自动 ${i} 的时间戳设置为最新提交的时间戳。这样主人在进行手动提交时，自动 ${i} 的频率就会降低哦。`)

regex.source: setDesc("Push commits every X minutes. Set to 0 (default) to disable.")
regex.target: setDesc("每 X 分钟推送一次提交。设置为 0（默认）以禁用。这是雷姆为您管理推送频率的设定哦。")

regex.source: setDesc("Pull changes every X minutes. Set to 0 (default) to disable.")
regex.target: setDesc("每 X 分钟拉取一次变更。设置为 0（默认）以禁用。雷姆会按照这个设定为您同步代码呢。")

regex.source: setDesc(`If turned on, only staged files are committed on ${i}. If turned off, all changed files are committed.`)
regex.target: setDesc(`如果开启，雷姆仅会提交 ${i} 上已暂存的文件。如果关闭，则会提交所有已更改的文件。请主人根据需要进行选择。`)

regex.source: setDesc("You will get a pop up to specify your message.")
regex.target: setDesc("主人将会收到一个弹窗来指定您的提交消息哦。")

regex.source: setDesc("Available placeholders: {{date}} (see below), {{hostname}} (see below), {{numFiles}} (number of changed files in the commit) and {{files}} (changed files in commit message).")
regex.target: setDesc("可用的占位符有：{{date}}（见下文），{{hostname}}（见下文），{{numFiles}}（提交中更改的文件数）和 {{files}}（提交消息中的已更改文件）。雷姆提醒主人可以灵活使用它们呢。")

regex.source: setDesc("A script that is run using 'sh -c' to generate the commit message. May be used to generate commit messages using AI tools. Available placeholders: {{hostname}}, {{date}}.")
regex.target: setDesc("这是一个使用 'sh -c' 运行的脚本，用于生成提交消息。主人也可以通过 AI 工具来生成提交消息哦。可用的占位符是：{{hostname}}, {{date}}。")

regex.source: setDesc(`Most of the time you want to push after committing. Turning this off turns a commit-and-sync action into commit ${n.settings.pullBeforePush?"and pull ":""}only. It will still be called commit-and-sync.`)
regex.target: setDesc(`大多数情况下，主人希望在提交后进行推送。关闭此选项会将“提交并同步”操作变为仅提交 ${n.settings.pullBeforePush?"和拉取 ":""}。不过雷姆还是会称它为提交并同步哦。`)

regex.source: setDesc(`On commit-and-sync, pull commits as well. Turning this off turns a commit-and-sync action into commit ${n.settings.disablePush?"":"and push "}only.`)
regex.target: setDesc(`在执行“提交并同步”时，雷姆也会拉取提交。关闭此选项会将“提交并同步”操作变为仅提交 ${n.settings.disablePush?"":"和推送 "}。`)

regex.source: setDesc("Hunks are sections of grouped line changes right in your editor.")
regex.target: setDesc("代码块是编辑器中分组行更改的部分，雷姆会帮主人清晰地管理它们。")

regex.source: setDesc("This allows you to see your changes right in your editor via colored markers and stage/reset/preview individual hunks.")
regex.target: setDesc("这允许主人通过彩色标记在编辑器中直接查看更改，并且可以暂存、重置或预览单个代码块。雷姆觉得这样很方便呢。")

regex.source: setDesc("Adds commands to stage/reset individual Git diff hunks and navigate between them via 'Go to next/prev hunk' commands.")
regex.target: setDesc("添加了命令来暂存或重置单个 Git diff 代码块，并通过“转到下一个/上一个代码块”命令在它们之间导航。雷姆会协助主人高效地处理这些变更哦。")

regex.source: setDesc("Show the author of the commit in the history view.")
regex.target: setDesc("在历史视图中显示提交的作者。这样主人就能清楚地知道是谁的贡献了呢。")

regex.source: setDesc("Show the date of the commit in the history view. The {{date}} placeholder format is used to display the date.")
regex.target: setDesc("在历史视图中显示提交的日期。雷姆会使用 {{date}} 占位符格式来显示日期，让主人一目了然。")

regex.source: setDesc("On slower machines this may cause lags. If so, just disable this option.")
regex.target: setDesc("在较慢的机器上，这可能会导致延迟。如果主人遇到了这种情况，只需禁用此选项就好。雷姆会调整到最适合您电脑的状态。")

regex.source: setDesc("Milliseconds to wait after file change before refreshing the Source Control View.")
regex.target: setDesc("文件更改后等待多少毫秒再刷新源代码管理视图。雷姆会耐心等待这个时间，避免不必要的刷新打扰到主人。")

regex.source: setDesc('Set the style for the diff view. Note that the actual diff in "Split" mode is not generated by Git, but the editor itself instead so it may differ from the diff generated by Git. One advantage of this is that you can edit the text in that view.')
regex.target: setDesc('设置差异视图的样式。雷姆提醒主人，请注意，“拆分”模式下的实际差异并非由 Git 生成，而是由编辑器本身生成，因此可能与 Git 生成的差异不同。这样做的一个优点是您可以在该视图中编辑文本，非常方便呢。')

regex.source: setDesc("Disable informative notifications for git operations to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates).")
regex.target: setDesc("禁用 Git 操作的信息通知以尽量减少干扰（更新信息请参考状态栏）。雷姆会保持安静，只在状态栏为您提供必要的信息哦。")

regex.source: setDesc("Disable error notifications of any kind to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates).")
regex.target: setDesc("禁用所有类型的错误通知以减少干扰（请参考状态栏获取更新信息）。雷姆会默默处理问题，尽量不打扰到主人。")

regex.source: setDesc("Don't show notifications when there are no changes to commit or push.")
regex.target: setDesc("当没有需要提交或推送的更改时，雷姆就不会显示通知了。这样可以让主人更专注于手头的工作呢。")

regex.source: setDesc("Obsidian must be restarted for the changes to take affect.")
regex.target: setDesc("主人，为了让更改生效，雷姆认为必须重启 Obsidian 才行呢。")

regex.source: setDesc('Add "Stage", "Unstage" and "Add to .gitignore" actions to the file menu.')
regex.target: setDesc('雷姆会在文件菜单里为您添加 "暂存"、"取消暂存" 和 "添加到 .gitignore" 这些操作哦。')

regex.source: setDesc("Type in your password. You won't be able to see it again.")
regex.target: setDesc("昴君，请输入您的密码。输入后，雷姆也无法再次看到它了呢。")

regex.source: setDesc("These settings usually don't need to be changed, but may be required for special setups.")
regex.target: setDesc("主人，这些设置通常无需更改，但雷姆觉得在特殊配置时可能还是需要调整一下呢。")

regex.source: setDesc('"Commit-and-sync" and "pull" takes care of submodules. Missing features: Conflicted files, count of pulled/pushed/committed files. Tracking branch needs to be set for each submodule.')
regex.target: setDesc('"提交并同步" 和 "拉取" 操作会由雷姆来帮您处理子模块哦。目前缺失的功能有：冲突文件、拉取/推送/提交的文件数量。另外，需要为每个子模块设置跟踪分支呢。')

regex.source: setDesc("Whenever a checkout happens on the root repository, recurse the checkout on the submodules (if the branches exist).")
regex.target: setDesc("主人，每当在根仓库上执行检出操作时，雷姆会递归地对子模块执行检出操作哦（前提是分支存在的话）。")

regex.source: setDesc("Specify the path to the Git binary/executable. Git should already be in your PATH. Should only be necessary for a custom Git installation.")
regex.target: setDesc("请指定 Git 二进制文件/可执行文件的路径。Git 通常应该已经在您的 PATH 环境变量中了。雷姆觉得，这通常只在您安装了自定义版本的 Git 时才需要设置呢。")

regex.source: setDesc("Use each line for a new environment variable in the format KEY=VALUE .")
regex.target: setDesc("请为每个新的环境变量使用单独的一行，格式为 KEY=VALUE 。")

regex.source: setDesc("Use each line for one path")
regex.target: setDesc("请为每个路径使用单独的一行。")

regex.source: setDesc("Removing previously added environment variables will not take effect until Obsidian is restarted.")
regex.target: setDesc("移除之前添加的环境变量需要重启 Obsidian 才能生效，请主人注意哦。")

regex.source: setDesc('Corresponds to the GIT_DIR environment variable. Requires restart of Obsidian to take effect. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.')
regex.target: setDesc('这对应着 GIT_DIR 环境变量。需要重启 Obsidian 才能生效。在 Windows 系统上，请使用 "\\" 而不是 "/"。雷姆会帮您记好的。')

regex.target: setDesc("在此设备上禁用此插件。这个设置不会被同步。")

regex.source: setDesc("If you like this Plugin, consider donating to support continued development.")
regex.target: setDesc("如果您喜欢这个插件，雷姆恳请您考虑捐赠以支持持续的开发工作。")

regex.target: setDesc("目前仅在桌面端可用。")

regex.target: setDesc("是否以及如何显示该行的创作日期和时间")
